summary: Validated 3 new P1 features end-to-end: (1) local image upload + static serving, (2) author profile (private /perfil + public /autor/:id), (3) Resend review notifications + request_changes action. 11/11 new pytest passed (test_p1_features.py). Full backend regression: 31/31 pytest green. Playwright covered: protected /perfil redirect, login -> nav-profile-btn -> /perfil form (name/bio/avatar/save/preview), bio persistence, public /autor/:id (anon hides edit btn, owner shows it), article detail (article-author-link href=/autor/:id, article-author-bottom-link, article-cover-image rendered), Dashboard new-article modal exposes article-cover-file-input + article-cover-upload-btn. Backend log confirms '[email] sent to autor@jpphub.com (action=approve)' and '(action=request_changes)' so Resend SDK call succeeded.
critical_code_review_comments: uploadRoutes.js: no per-user quota or filename rate-limit. Authenticated user could fill the disk by uploading 5MB images repeatedly (rate-limit middleware applies, 500 req / 15min, but each is up to 5MB). Consider per-user storage cap and/or extension whitelist beyond mime check (mime can be spoofed in multipart).
userController.updateProfile no valida longitud max de bio (frontend la limita a 500, backend acepta cualquier string). Schema Joi recomendado para alinear con UI counter.
userController.updateProfile no valida formato/longitud de avatarUrl (acepta cualquier string). Si se permite URL absoluta, validar protocolo http(s) o prefijo /api/uploads/.

emailService.js: SENDER usa onboarding@resend.dev (Resend test mode) -> en prod solo entrega al owner verificado. Documentar que hay que configurar dominio verificado en Resend antes de salir a produccion, sino los autores reales no recibiran notificaciones.
articleValidators.js mantiene 'review' como accion valida ademas de 'request_changes'. Si 'review' es legacy/obsoleta, considerar removerla para evitar duplicidad semantica.
Backend log persiste id=unknown del Resend response - probablemente la SDK devuelve {data:{id}} pero tambien {error}. Loggear el error completo cuando hay fallo seria util para debug.
GET /api/users/:id/profile no incluye paginacion en articles. Si un autor tiene muchos articulos aprobados, payload puede crecer. Considerar limit/offset.
/app/frontend/.env sigue con REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL vacio (issue heredado iteracion_3). Funciona por fallback a window.location.origin.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_p1_features.py (NUEVO - 11 tests cubren upload, profile, public profile, review email)
seed_data_creation: Creado articulo TEST_P1 cover image article for review (con coverImage relativa /api/uploads/files/fake-cover.png) usado para validar review request_changes + approve. Bio del autor demo actualizada a 'Soy autor de prueba en JppHub - bio actualizada por Playwright.'. Avatar URL del autor demo apunta a /api/uploads/files/fake-avatar.png (404 al cargar imagen, esperado, fallback a iniciales 'AD' funciona).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Las 3 features P1 funcionan E2E. Test data sembrada: 1 articulo TEST_P1 aprobado (slug testp1-cover-image-article-for-review-moaplfmi) atribuido a autor demo (id 7c0658f2-c614-4dde-b9d6-c1ee93befb27). Resend en TEST mode (onboarding@resend.dev) - logs '[email] sent to ...' aparecen en /var/log/supervisor/backend.out.log para verificar SDK call sin verificar entrega real. Endpoints publicos: GET /api/users/:id/profile (sin auth). Endpoints auth: PATCH /api/users/me, POST /api/uploads. Static: GET /api/uploads/files/:filename. Frontend testids confirmados: nav-profile-btn, mobile-profile-btn, profile-form, profile-name-input, profile-bio-input, profile-save-btn, profile-preview-btn, profile-avatar-* (en perfil), author-name, author-bio, author-edit-profile-btn, author-articles-grid (en /autor/:id), article-author-link, article-author-bottom-link, article-cover-image (en /articulos/:slug), article-cover-file-input, article-cover-upload-btn (en dashboard new-article modal).
rca of the issue: N/A - sin issues. Todas las 3 features P1 implementadas correctamente y validadas via pytest + Playwright.
